title: Alternate format options for questions in forms
excerpt: It would be beneficial to have a way to change the format of a multi-select questions from a drop down into a radio button selection – or some other format. Essentially, I would like to have an alternate format besides t…

posts.author: jdose (JD)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be beneficial to have a way to change the format of a multi-select questions from a drop down into a radio button selection – or some other format. Essentially, I would like to have an alternate format besides the drop down for a question with multiple selection options. This would allow for various layout of the form and also add to the user experience so that the submitter doesn’t always have to select from a drop down - they can see all the options at once and select a checkbox or radio-button or something along those lines.

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jdose

Nachliel from Easyapps here

Our monday app form builder Easyform enables you to turn a dropdown question into a single select and display the options as radio buttons:

Other supported features include:

  • Connected Columns support in forms
  • Responsive styling in order for you form to look better on small screens.
  • Item Default values for Status, Dropdown and Connected Boards question.

Regardless, if you are interested in creating styled forms that better match your brand and embed perfectly in you web page you can check out our monday app Easyform and our extensive documentation site.

You can set up a free demo here or contact us at support@easyappshq.com.

I hope this helps

Nachliel
